tool_args.label: CPRB Approved 2015-2019 Capital Program
tool_args.raw_text: CPRB approved the $26.600 billion CPRB portion on May 23, 2016

tool_args.label: Amendment #4 MTA Board Approval
tool_args.raw_text: On September 25, 2019, the MTA Board approved an amendment (amendment #4) to the program

tool_args.label: Amendment #5 MTA Board Approval
tool_args.raw_text: On June 27, 2023, the MTA Board approved a funding-only amendment (amendment #5)

tool_args.label: CPRB Deemed Approved Amendment #4
tool_args.raw_text: The CPRB portion of the amendment was deemed approved on February 21, 2020

tool_args.label: Capital Program focus: renewal
tool_args.raw_text: Most of the program focuses on renewing the system to promote safe and reliable service.

payload.claim_text: Most of the program focuses on renewing the system to promote safe and reliable service.
payload.subject: MTA 2015-2019 Capital Program

tool_args.label: B&T does not require CPRB approval
tool_args.raw_text: Bridges and Tunnels (B&T), which does not require CPRB approval

payload.claim_text: Bridges and Tunnels (B&T), which does not require CPRB approval, is also proposing changes to reduce the program envelope
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 budget unchanged
tool_args.raw_text: The $1.735 billion budget in the 2015-2019 Capital Program for Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 is effectively unchanged.

payload.subject: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison opened for service
tool_args.raw_text: Grand Central Madison has opened for customer service and the project has transitioned to wrap-up work

payload.claim_text: Grand Central Madison has opened for customer service and the project has transitioned to wrap-up work on both sides of the East River.
payload.subject: East Side Access

tool_args.label: LIRR Main Line third track opened
tool_args.raw_text: the mainline third track has opened for customer service

payload.claim_text: The mainline third track has opened for customer service and the project has transitioned to wrap-up work between Floral Park and Hicksville.
payload.subject: LIRR Expansion Project (3rd Track)

payload.scope: SAS 2 Heavy Civil at 125th, TBM Tunnel

tool_args.label: NYCT electric bus purchase increase
tool_args.raw_text: budget increase for the purchase of 45 standard battery-electric buses and the construction of required charging infrastructure +$44 million

payload.claim_text: The Buses category increases by +$13 million, primarily due to a budget increase for the purchase of 45 standard battery-electric buses and the construction of required charging infrastructure +$44 million offset by budget savings in other purchases.
payload.subject: NYCT Buses

tool_args.label: CBTC Queens Boulevard West additional support
tool_args.raw_text: providing additional support to the CBTC Queens Boulevard West project (+$102 million)

payload.claim_text: The increase in the signals category is primarily due to providing additional support to the CBTC Queens Boulevard West project (+$102 million).
payload.subject: NYCT Signals & Communications
